component.name: Porkill
component.summary: A cyberpunk-themed GUI for monitoring and killing processes by port

description.p: Porkill is a Linux desktop application for visualising every open network port alongside the process that owns it — and killing it with one click. It reads directly from /proc/net/ with no external tools required, though it falls back to ss or netstat when available. The UI is built with tkinter and styled in a neon cyberpunk aesthetic with a live matrix-rain animation header.
